review_log.description: Enterprise compliance review log tracking all internal and external review findings, remediation status, and audit outcomes.

entries.finding: All active KYC providers meet SLA uptime requirements. Didit pilot provider performing within expected parameters.
Role-based access controls verified across all 24 root directories. No unauthorized access detected in audit logs.
Non-custodial design verified. No PII storage detected. All identity references use SHA3-256 hashes as required.
SoT compliance check identified placeholder files in YAML/JSON configurations across multiple roots. Content must be replaced with operational configurations.
entries.remediation: Replace all AUTO-GENERATED PLACEHOLDER files with real operational content. Tracked in structure_guard remediation cycle.
